title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Massive Restaurants

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Massive Restaurants
jsonLd.description:
Massive Restaurants is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Hyderabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Massive Restaurants:
Massive Restaurants is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Massive Restaurants!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
